info.name: ResolveJa API
info.description: Collection para testes manuais end-to-end da API ResolveJá.

exec: const active = json.data.find((s) => s && (s.active === true || s.active === undefined));

body.raw:
{
  "displayName": "[TEST] Prestador ResolveJá",
  "bio": "Prestador de teste para o MVP.",
  "baseState": "RS",
  "baseCity": "Passo Fundo",
  "baseNeighborhood": "Centro",
  "serviceRadiusKm": 15
}

{

exec: if (pm.response.code === 403) { pm.test('success false', function(){ pm.expect(json.success).to.eql(false); }); } else { pm.test('success true when 200', function(){ pm.expect(json.success).to.eql(true); }); }
